heading: Certification of funds deducted for expenses and amounts apportioned to States
label: 777d Certification of funds deducted for expenses and amounts apportioned to States
text: For each fiscal year beginning with the fiscal year ending , the Secretary of the Interior shall certify, at the time at which a deduction or apportionment is made, to the Secretary of the Treasury, and to each State fish and game department, the sum which he has estimated to be deducted for administering this chapter and the sum which he has apportioned to each State for such fiscal year.June 30, 1951
notes: Amendments2000— inserted “, at the time at which a deduction or apportionment is made,” after “certify” and struck out “and executing” after “administering”.Pub. L. 106–4081984— struck out provisions relating to notice by the State to the Secretary of intention to accept, and use of funds where the State fails to accept.Pub. L. 98–369

Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective , and applicable with respect to fiscal years beginning after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–369section 1014(b) of Pub. L. 98–369section 777 of this titleOct. 1, 1984Sept. 30, 1984
